title: Spicy Paneer Quesadilla
description: A Mexican twist on a classic Indian dish, this spicy paneer quesadilla is a flavorful and spicy fusion meal.
instructions: Heat a large skillet over medium-high heat.
In a bowl, mix together cumin, chili powder, garlic powder, salt, and pepper.
Add the spice mixture to the skillet and cook for 1 minute.
Add the diced onion and bell pepper to the skillet and cook until softened.
Add the diced paneer and cook until lightly browned.
Stir in the cottage cheese and cook until heated through.
In a separate pan or griddle, warm the tortillas over medium heat.
Place a tortilla in the pan and sprinkle shredded cheese on half of the tortilla.
Add the paneer mixture on top of the cheese.
Fold the tortilla in half and cook until the cheese is melted and the tortilla is crispy.
Flip the quesadilla and cook for an additional 2-3 minutes.
Cut the quesadillas into wedges and serve with sour cream and cilantro.
Garnish with chopped cilantro and serve immediately.
